mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.title, b.content, b.date, b.product_id, u.id as "user.id", u.user_code as "user.userCode", w.id as "weather.id", w.weather_prompt, w.image FROM boards b LEFT JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN weather w ON b.weather_id = w.id

SELECT b.id, b.user_id, b.title, b.content, b.date, b.weather_id, b.product_id, u.id as "user.id", u.user_code as "user.userCode", u.user_name as "user.username", w.id as "weather.id", w.weather_prompt as "weather.weatherPrompt", w.image as "weather.image", p.id as "product.id", p.name as "product.name", p.category as "product.category", p.sale_price as "product.salePrice", p.original_image as "product.originalImage", p.ai_image as "product.aiImage" FROM boards b JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN weather w ON b.weather_id = w.id LEFT JOIN product p ON b.product_id = p.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO boards (user_id, title, content, date, weather_id, product_id) VALUES ( #{user.id}, #{title}, #{content}, NOW(), #{weatherId}, #{productId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE boards SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, weather_id = #{weatherId}, product_id = #{productId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_likes (user_id, board_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{boardId}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, board_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.select: SELECT board_id, COUNT(*) as like_count FROM user_likes GROUP BY board_id
